data.name: diffractionPatternControlSimulation.WaveProperty
data.value: AAEAAAD/////AQAAAAAAAAAMAgAAADVDcnlzdGFsbG9ncmFwaHksIEN1bHR1cmU9bmV1dHJhbCwgUHVi bGljS2V5VG9rZW49bnVsbAUBAAAAHENyeXN0YWxsb2dyYXBoeS5XYXZlUHJvcGVydHkHAAAABlNvdXJj ZQpXYXZlTGVuZ3RoEVhyYXlFbGVtZW50TnVtYmVyCFhyYXlMaW5lBkVuZXJneRBNb25vY2hyb21hdGlj aXR5C0NvbnZlcmdlbmNlBAAABAAAABpDcnlzdGFsbG9ncmFwaHkuV2F2ZVNvdXJjZQIAAAAGCBhDcnlz dGFsbG9ncmFwaHkuWHJheUxpbmUCAAAABgYGAgAAAAX9////GkNyeXN0YWxsb2dyYXBoeS5XYXZlU291 cmNlAQAAAAd2YWx1ZV9fAAgCAAAAAAAAAFY2Be/yKKU/AAAAAAX8////GENyeXN0YWxsb2dyYXBoeS5Y cmF5TGluZQEAAAAHdmFsdWVfXwAIAgAAAAAAAABp5////0vdQPFo44i1+OQ+9WG3A3GYTD8L

data.name: checkBox2.ToolTip
data.value: Enable the Rz (θ) axis: side-to-side 'swing' oscillation of the sample, set by its motor speed (°/s) and oscillation range (±°) below.

data.name: checkBox3.ToolTip
data.value: Enable the Ry (ω) axis: 'nodding' oscillation of the sample, set by its motor speed (°/s), oscillation range (±°) and step (°) below.

data.name: checkBoxCrystalNumPerStepThreshold.ToolTip
data.value: Stop the fit automatically once the annealed 'Num per Step' falls below the threshold value (%) set on the right.

data.name: checkBoxDirectionalDensityThreshold.ToolTip
data.value: Stop the fit automatically once the annealed 'Directional density' falls below the threshold value (°) set on the right.

data.name: checkBoxInheritabiliryThreshold.ToolTip
data.value: Stop the fit automatically once 'Inheritability' rises above the threshold value (%) set on the right.

data.name: checkBoxRefineCenterOffset.ToolTip
data.value: Include the beam-centre offset as a free parameter in the fit, refining the pattern's centre position to best match the reference.

data.name: checkBoxRefineConvergence.ToolTip
data.value: Include the beam convergence angle as a free parameter in the fit (refines how much the incident beam converges).

data.name: checkBoxRefineFilmBlur.ToolTip
data.value: Include the film/detector blur (point-spread broadening of each spot) as a free parameter in the fit.

data.name: checkBoxRefinePreferredOrientation.ToolTip
data.value: Refine the preferred-orientation (texture/LPO) density distribution. This is the core of the fit and is always enabled (cannot be turned off).

data.name: checkBoxRefineStress.ToolTip
data.value: Include residual stress (lattice strain that shifts/broadens the rings) as a free parameter in the fit.

data.name: checkBoxYusaGonioScan.ToolTip
data.value: Simulate an oscillating ('Yusa-type') goniometer: integrate the pattern over the Rx(Φ rotation), Rz(θ swing) and Ry(ω nod) motions set below, mimicking a real powder/texture measurement.

data.name: checkBoxYusaGonio_ValidRx.ToolTip
data.value: Enable the Rx (Φ) axis: continuous spin of the sample about its surface normal at the motor speed set on the right (°/s).

data.name: comboBoxGradient.ToolTip
data.value: Gradient direction of the intensity display: Positive shows high intensity bright, Negative inverts it (high intensity dark).

data.name: comboBoxScale1.ToolTip
data.value: Intensity mapping for the displayed pattern: logarithmic scale (emphasises weak reflections) or linear scale.

data.name: comboBoxScale2.ToolTip
data.value: Colour map for the displayed pattern: grey scale or a cold-to-warm colour scale.

data.name: numericBoxCrystalNumPerStep.ToolTip
data.value: Fraction of crystallites (%) whose orientation is perturbed at each refinement step of the preferred-orientation (LPO, Lattice Preferred Orientation) fit. Larger = bigger steps; the value is annealed down (×0.8) as the fit converges.

data.name: numericBoxCrystalNumPerStepThreshold.ToolTip
data.value: Threshold value (%) for 'Num per Step': the fit stops when the parameter is annealed below this level.

data.name: numericBoxDirectionalDensity.ToolTip
data.value: Angular spread (°) of the orientation bias applied at each refinement step: the half-width over which a chosen orientation's density is reinforced. Annealed smaller (×0.8) as the fit sharpens.

data.name: numericBoxDirectionalDensityThreshold.ToolTip
data.value: Threshold value (°) for 'Directional density': the fit stops when the parameter is annealed below this level.

data.name: numericBoxInheritabiliry.ToolTip
data.value: Probability (%) that a refinement step reuses ('inherits') an already high-density orientation rather than picking one at random; higher values drive the fit toward a sharper texture.

data.name: numericBoxInheritabiliryThreshold.ToolTip
data.value: Threshold value (%) for 'Inheritability': the fit stops once the parameter rises above this level.

data.name: numericBoxRxSpeed.ToolTip
data.value: Motor speed of the Rx (Φ) rotation axis, in degrees per second (°/s). Faster rotation averages over more in-plane orientations.

data.name: numericBoxYusaGonioRyOscillation.ToolTip
data.value: Oscillation (nodding) range of the Ry (ω) axis, in ± degrees about the centre.

data.name: numericBoxYusaGonioRySpeed.ToolTip
data.value: Motor speed of the Ry (ω) nodding axis, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: numericBoxYusaGonioRyStep.ToolTip
data.value: Angular step (°) of the Ry (ω) oscillation: the increment per ω advance during the scan; smaller gives finer orientation sampling but slower simulation.

data.name: numericBoxYusaGonioRzOscillation.ToolTip
data.value: Oscillation (swing) range of the Rz (θ) axis, in ± degrees about the centre; the sample rocks between −value and +value.

data.name: numericBoxYusaGonioRzSpeed.ToolTip
data.value: Motor speed of the Rz (θ) swing axis, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: radioButtonZigzagScan.ToolTip
data.value: Zigzag scan order: sweep θ (Rz) forward and back while ω (Ry) advances each turn, so the goniometer traces a zigzag path through orientation space.

data.name: button1.ToolTip
data.value: Debug test: generate the diffraction pattern of a single random orientation for the selected crystals.

data.name: buttonSimulateDebyeRing.ToolTip
data.value: Simulate the polycrystalline Debye-ring (powder) diffraction pattern for the selected crystals and show it in the current tab.

data.name: buttonLoadSetting.ToolTip
data.value: Load a previously saved orientation-fitting setting (.setting file).

data.name: buttonSaveCurrentSetting.ToolTip
data.value: Save the current orientation-fitting setting (crystals, parameters and residual history) to a .setting file.

data.name: buttonSearch.ToolTip
data.value: Start or stop fitting the crystal orientation distribution (LPO, Lattice-Preferred Orientation) so the simulated pattern best matches the reference patterns. Click again to stop.

data.name: buttonAddRefferencePattern.ToolTip
data.value: Add a measured reference diffraction pattern (.ipa image) as a fitting target. It opens in a new tab.

data.name: buttonRemoveReferrencePattern.ToolTip
data.value: Remove the reference diffraction pattern selected in the list (and its tab).

data.name: listBoxReferrence.ToolTip
data.value: List of loaded reference diffraction patterns. Select one to switch to its tab.

data.name: checkBox6.ToolTip
data.value: Automatically save the setting periodically during fitting. (Currently disabled.)

data.name: checkBoxAutomaticallyChangeParameter.ToolTip
data.value: Automatically shrink the fitting parameters when the residual stops improving fast enough. (Currently fixed on.)

data.name: numericBoxChangeParameterThreshold.ToolTip
data.value: Threshold (0-1) for auto-shrinking the fitting parameters. When the ratio of the recent to the earlier residual (Rwp) slope falls below this value, the parameters are reduced to 0.8x.

data.name: textBox1.ToolTip
data.value: Read-only fitting log: elapsed time, speed (ms/step), step count, number of successful updates, residual (%) and S value.

data.name: buttonSearchUnrelatedOrientations.ToolTip
data.value: Iteratively find and remove crystallite orientations that do not contribute to the diffraction pattern, keeping only the contributing ones.

data.name: label26.ToolTip
data.value: Colour map for the displayed pattern: grey scale or a cold-to-warm colour scale.

data.name: label28.ToolTip
data.value: Intensity mapping for the displayed pattern: logarithmic scale (emphasises weak reflections) or linear scale.

data.name: label30.ToolTip
data.value: Gradient direction of the intensity display: Positive shows high intensity bright, Negative inverts it.

data.name: label47.ToolTip
data.value: Oscillation (nodding) range of the Ry (ω) axis, in ± degrees about the centre.

data.name: label48.ToolTip
data.value: Oscillation (swing) range of the Rz (θ) axis, in ± degrees about the centre.

data.name: label49.ToolTip
data.value: Angular step (°) of the Ry (ω) oscillation; smaller gives finer orientation sampling but slower simulation.

data.name: label50.ToolTip
data.value: Oscillation (nodding) range of the Ry (ω) axis, in ± degrees about the centre.

data.name: label51.ToolTip
data.value: Oscillation (swing) range of the Rz (θ) axis, in ± degrees about the centre.

data.name: label52.ToolTip
data.value: Motor speed of the Rx (Φ) rotation axis, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: label53.ToolTip
data.value: Angular step (°) of the Ry (ω) oscillation.

data.name: label54.ToolTip
data.value: Motor speed of the Ry (ω) nodding axis, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: label55.ToolTip
data.value: Oscillation (nodding) range of the Ry (ω) axis, in ± degrees about the centre.

data.name: label56.ToolTip
data.value: Motor speed of the Rz (θ) swing axis, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: label57.ToolTip
data.value: Oscillation (swing) range of the Rz (θ) axis, in ± degrees about the centre.

data.name: label58.ToolTip
data.value: Motor speed of the Ry (ω) nodding axis, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: label59.ToolTip
data.value: Motor speed of the Rz (θ) swing axis, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: label60.ToolTip
data.value: Motor speed of the Rx (Φ) rotation axis, in degrees per second (°/s).
